texto: In the calm of sweet communion Let thy daily work be done In the peace of soul-outpouring Care be banished patience won And if earth with its enchantments Seek thy spirit to enthrall Ere thou listen ere thou answer Turn to Jesus tell Him all.
explicacao: Citação de G. M. Taylor sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In the calm of sweet communion Let thy daily work be done In the peace of soul-outpouring Care be…” articula reflexao, prayer, sweet em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
